Vallisnaria

Page No.-29, Easy
72. Dominant biotic pollinating agents are-
A) Bees B) Birds
C) Butterflies D) Ants
Page No.-29, Easy
73. How many of the following may act as
pollinators-?
Bees, butterflies, wasps, beetles, leopard,
bats, pigeon
A) 5 B) 4
C) 3 D) 2
